overrides.name: openai-harmony
overrides.rationale: OpenAI ships openai-harmony 0.0.8 with empty PEP-621 license metadata. Source repo https://github.com/openai/harmony is MIT-licensed (verified at the commit corresponding to the 0.0.8 release tag). This override accepts the dep until upstream sets the metadata.

overrides.name: sentencepiece
overrides.rationale: Google's sentencepiece 0.2.1 ships with empty PEP-621 license metadata. Source repo https://github.com/google/sentencepiece is Apache-2.0 (verified). Pulled in transitively by mlx-lm. This override accepts the dep until upstream sets the metadata.
